title: Knowledge Ingestion System Enhancements
summary: Implement append-only ingestion for facts, glossary, timeline, sources; safe command appending; conflict resolution policy; adaptive suggestion engine; and company information replacement policy.
tasks: Design and implement conflict resolution and replacement policy
Build adaptive suggestion and reservoir expansion engine
Define and implement company info replacement guidelines

title: Document Redistillation Function
summary: A discrete function to redistil documents appended over time. Rewrites to preserve all information while streamlining: adjust categories, amend phrasing/language, add ideas. Nothing dropped. If contradictions emerge, surface them in a pre-finalization step for user resolution via conversational engagement with AI. For example, rewrite accumulated personal facts into a coherent document, merging/streamlining, removing contradictions by surfacing and resolving with user.
